title: Device Home screen - Software version
scenario: Verify software version format on Device Home screen in Poly Studio Mobile app for Morpheus (X.Y) and Neo/Chronos (setid) devices
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
3. Locate the connected device name and its software version displayed on the Home screen.
4. If the connected device is a Morpheus device (e.g., Voyager Focus UC), verify the version is displayed in X.Y format, where X is the firmware version and Y is the language version.
5. If the connected device is a Neo or Chronos device (e.g., Voyager 5200 Series), verify the version is displayed in setid format (e.g., 0.0.285.1601).
expected: The software version is correctly displayed on the Device Home screen in the Poly Studio Mobile app. For Morpheus devices, the version appears in X.Y format (firmware.language). For Neo and Chronos devices, the version appears in setid format (e.g., 0.0.285.1601).
